title: treedocs.yaml
description: Schema for the YAML repository documentation state maintained by treedocs.
markdownDescription: Schema for `treedocs.yaml`, the repository documentation state maintained by the `treedocs` CLI. Schema `0.2.0` reserves underscore-prefixed metadata keys inside `tree`: `_doc`, `_link`, `_description`, and `_references`.

schema_version.title: Schema Version
schema_version.description: The treedocs.yaml file-format schema version. This is distinct from project.version.
schema_version.markdownDescription: The `treedocs.yaml` file-format schema version. Use `0.2.0` for files using `_description` and `_references`. This is distinct from `project.version`.

signature.title: Filesystem Signature
signature.description: Deterministic SHA-256 structural hash of the scanned tree. treedocs updates this value during init, sync, and update.
signature.markdownDescription: Deterministic SHA-256 structural hash of the scanned tree. The CLI updates this during `treedocs init`, `treedocs sync`, and `treedocs update`.

tree.title: Documentation Tree
tree.description: Nested filesystem mirror keyed by repository-relative path components or relative path strings.
tree.markdownDescription: Nested filesystem mirror keyed by repository-relative path components or relative path strings. Inside tree entries, underscore-prefixed keys are reserved treedocs metadata; normal keys represent filesystem entries.

project.title: Project Metadata
project.markdownDescription: Repository metadata stored in `treedocs.yaml`. `project.version` describes the documented project, not the treedocs schema version.

version.title: Project Version
version.description: Version of the documented project. This is not the treedocs.yaml schema version.

last_updated.title: Last Updated
last_updated.description: Date this treedocs state was initialized or last intentionally refreshed, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.

additionalProperties.description: Additional project metadata preserved by treedocs. Values must be strings.

overrides.title: Configuration Overrides
overrides.description: Project-local configuration overrides stored in treedocs.yaml.
overrides.markdownDescription: Project-local configuration overrides. These override built-in defaults and external `.treedocs/config.yaml` settings when the CLI loads this state file.

exclude.title: Exclude Patterns
exclude.description: Ignore patterns applied while scanning the repository.
exclude.markdownDescription: Ignore patterns applied while scanning. Patterns are merged with standard excludes, `.gitignore`, and `.treedocs/.treedocs_ignore`.

use_gitignore.title: Use .gitignore
use_gitignore.description: Whether scanner ignore behavior includes patterns from .gitignore.

max_description_length.title: Maximum Description Length
max_description_length.description: Maximum rendered description length before truncation. Use 0 to disable truncation.

indent_size.title: Indent Size
indent_size.description: Reserved indentation setting parsed and preserved by the CLI.

align_columns.title: Align Columns
align_columns.description: Whether renderers should align description columns when supported.

check_severity.title: Check Severity
enumDescriptions: treedocs check exits non-zero when it finds issues.
treedocs check reports issues without failing the process.
check_severity.description: Controls whether treedocs check issues fail or warn.

auto_init_empty.title: Auto Init Empty Repositories
auto_init_empty.description: Reserved setting parsed and preserved by the CLI.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Reserved renderer theme name parsed and preserved by the CLI.

icons.title: Icons
icons.description: Reserved renderer icon setting parsed and preserved by the CLI.

ai_provider.title: AI Provider
ai_provider.description: Reserved AI provider identifier parsed and preserved by the CLI.

ai_model.title: AI Model
ai_model.description: Reserved AI model identifier parsed and preserved by the CLI.

entryDocumentation.title: Entry Documentation
entryDocumentation.description: Documentation can be a compact description string or an object with _description and _references metadata.
entryDocumentation.markdownDescription: Documentation can be a compact description string or an object with `_description` and `_references` metadata. Use object form when references are needed.

oneOf.title: Compact Description
oneOf.description: Simple human-readable description for a file or directory.

description.title: Description
description.description: Human-readable documentation for a tree entry.
description.markdownDescription: Human-readable documentation for a tree entry. Empty strings mean the description is still missing; `_` may be used as an intentional blank sentinel.

references.title: References
references.description: Supplementary documentation references for a tree entry.
references.markdownDescription: Supplementary documentation references. Each item can be a repository-local path, an HTTPS URL, or a Markdown link to either.

reference.title: Reference
reference.description: Supplementary documentation reference: a local path, an HTTPS URL, or a markdown link to either.

oneOf.title: Markdown Link Reference
oneOf.description: Markdown link whose target is a local path or HTTPS URL.

treeEntry.title: Tree Entry
treeEntry.description: A documented file or directory path. Strings are simple descriptions; objects may contain underscore-prefixed metadata, links, and nested children.
treeEntry.markdownDescription: A documented file or directory path. Strings are simple descriptions. Objects may contain reserved metadata keys (`_doc`, `_link`, `_description`, `_references`) and normal child keys for filesystem entries. In schema `0.2.0`, `description` and `references` are normal child names, not metadata.

oneOf.title: Compact File Description
oneOf.description: Simple description for a leaf file entry.

_doc.title: Directory Documentation
_doc.markdownDescription: Documentation for this directory entry. Use compact string form for only a description, or object form with `_description` and `_references` when references are needed.

_link.title: Link Target
_link.description: Alias target for this entry. Use a documented tree path, relative path, or external URL.
_link.markdownDescription: Alias target for this entry. The CLI resolves internal `_link` targets against documented tree paths and reports broken or cyclic links.
